path.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(192, 192, 192), rgb(106, 106, 106)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
